title: Curry Noodles Are the Best Travel Companion
overview: It’s approaching the end of the year. Rin plans a solo camping trip, while the Outdoors Club members earn cash to buy more gear.

title: New Year's Solo Camper Girl
overview: It’s New Year’s Eve. Rin arrives at the shore in Shizuoka. Nadeshiko is busy with her temp job, when she receives a message from Rin.

title: Surprise Camping and Some Deep Thoughts
overview: Nadeshiko is spending New Years at her grandma’s place in Shizuoka. Her friend, Ayano is staying over, and Rin joins them to hang out.

title: What Are You Buying With Your Temp Job Money?
overview: With winter break over, the girls begin planning their next OutClub outing.

title: Caribou-kun and Lake Yamanaka
overview: Chiaki, Aoi and Ena buy new camping gear, and they set out to go camping at Lake Yamanaka.

title: Cape Ohmama in Winter
overview: Chiaki, Aoi and Ena arrive at Lake Yamanaka, but they run into some trouble.

title: Nadeshiko's Solo Camp Planning
overview: Nadeshiko goes solo camping for the first time. Meanwhile, Rin, who is out touring Hayakawa City, bumps into Nadeshiko’s sister, Sakura.

title: Camping Alone
overview: Nadeshiko arrives at her campsite and begins experimenting with outdoor cooking, when two kids show up.

title: Winter's End and the Day of Departure
overview: Everyone is going to Izu to camp soon, and so Nadeshiko plans what to make. Meanwhile, Rin adds some new parts to her bike, when her grandpa pays her a visit.

title: The Izu Camp Trip Begins!
overview: Akari joins the other campers, and they head out to Izu. They check out various geospots and try the local food.

title: Izu Camping!! On the Way
overview: The gang changes course and head toward a different campsite. After they hit the hot springs, at night, Nadeshiko treats them to her cooking.

title: Izu Camping!!! Birthdays!
overview: It’s the second day of the OutClub’s Izu trip. They go to Dougashima Island and walk across the tombolo, and put on a surprise birthday party for Nadeshko and Aoi at the end of the day.

title: I'm Home
overview: It’s the last day of the Izu trip. The group visit the Iidas, who had helped them on their Izu trip and say hi to the hot spring capybaras.
